ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Point Guard, Power Forward) */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the team */,
  "team_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Team efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season statistic */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2021-2022) */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" REAL /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" REAL /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "player_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season statistic */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2021-2022) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds grabbed by the team */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made by the team */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers committed by the team */,
  "field_goals_made" REAL /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" REAL /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" REAL /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" REAL /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" REAL /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" REAL /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "team_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Team efficiency rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_season_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season (e.g., 2021-2022) */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., trade, free agent signing) */,
  "team_from" TEXT /* Team the player is moving from (if applicable) */,
  "team_to" TEXT /* Team the player is moving to (if applicable) */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
